description: Style NoteStretchy and comfy room-to-grow style t-shirt from Mr men, this stylish tee is the go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades!Product DetailsBlack t-shirt with a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and rubber print on the frontMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
